profil.deskripsi_bisnis: PT Informasi Teknologi Indonesia Tbk operates as a technology solutions company in Indonesia. The company operates through SMS Broadcast, Whatsapp, and Other Services segments. Its products portfolio includes WhatsApp Business API; BerandaToko, a chat commerce application; CPRO, a CRM system; Coster, a helpdesk ticketing system; Jessie, a chat commerce solution; SMS Broadcast, a SMS broadcast provider; email blast applications; automated chatbot support services using artificial intelligence (AI); SMS location-based advertising services; and mobile applications and systems development solutions. It serves companies operating in various sectors, including telecommunications, banking, insurance, multi finance, financial technology, retail distribution, consumer goods, electronic trading, travel services, hospitality, government, logistics, and automotive. The company was founded in 2002 and is based in Jakarta Selatan, Indonesia. PT Informasi Teknologi Indonesia Tbk operates as a subsidiary of PT Jati Piranti Solusindo.
